title: Cirrus: Simplify CI for minimal testing
body:
Since this release version is no-longer supported, disable most CI
testing.  Retain the bare minimum to keep VM images alive, in case
for some unknown reason, CI needs to be re-enabled later.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>
